title: Deavy's Armory
body:
### **Back with update 0.1.0!**

- All models were remade and updates from now on will again be periodic

## Weapons

- All weapons can be obtained from **Weaponsmiths**, which will need **Blueprints** dropped by powerful mobs (Ender Dragon, Wither, Elder Guardian, Evoker, Ravager)

### Shlamake

- 9 Damage
- 0.8 Attack Speed

### Sword Breaker

- 4 Damage
- 2.0 Attack Speed


### Obsidian Spade Blade

- 9 Damage
- 1.0 Attack Speed

### A Tale Of Wind

- 5 Damage
- 1.8 Attack Speed

### Corruptor

- 6 Damage
- 1.6 Attack Speed

### Steel Stake

- 15 Damage
- 0.5 Attack Speed

### Red Eyes

- 6 Damage
- 1.6 Attack Speed

**All weapon models can be viewed in the gallery**

## Items

### Blueprints

- All weapons have their own respective blueprint. **Boss** mobs have a **100%** chance to drop a blueprint, while the **Ravager** and the **Evoker** have a **25%** chance of dropping them.
 
- Blueprints can be traded in to **Master** Weaponsmiths alongside 10 Emeralds for their weapon counterpart.
